title: Account Defaults
description: Account/environment-level defaults a customer fills ONCE (from AWS console view access) and reuses for every RDS for Db2 deployment in that account. The skill merges these into each deployment intent; any value named in the prompt overrides the matching default. region, vpc_id, vpc_security_group_ids, and the IBM identifiers are REQUIRED in a deployable intent (the skill never creates a VPC/security group and never fabricates IBM IDs). kms_key_id, master_user_secret_kms_key_id, db_subnet_group_name, and monitoring_role_arn are OPTIONAL: leave them blank ('' or omitted) to CREATE the resource on the first apply (via the 3-kms / 1-networking / 2-iam modules), or supply an existing identifier to REUSE it. Reuse is not automatic across deployments, so record the created names/ARNs here after the first deploy to reuse them for every subsequent instance. Field names match the deployment-intent field names exactly so the merge is a straight copy. No secrets belong in this file (no master password, no AWS keys).

schema_version.description: Version of this account-defaults file format.

_about.description: Free-text note for humans; ignored by the skill.

region.description: Default AWS region for deployments in this account (e.g. us-east-1).

engine_major_version.description: Default Db2 engine major version for deployments in this account. Valid: '11.5' or '12.1'. Optional; when omitted the skill defaults to 12.1 (the current latest). A prompt value overrides this. Note db2-ce is 12.1-only, so '11.5' applies to db2-se / db2-ae. The skill resolves the highest available minor of this major live from the RDS API (never fabricated).

vpc_id.description: VPC the DB lives in (VPC console). Always customer-owned — the skill never creates a VPC. Required by the 5-rds and 1-networking modules.

db_subnet_group_name.description: DB subnet group (RDS console -> Subnet groups). Leave blank ('' or omitted) to CREATE one from the VPC's subnets via the 1-networking module on the first apply; supply an existing group name to REUSE it. Record the created name here afterward to reuse it.

vpc_security_group_ids.description: Existing security group id(s) to reuse (VPC console -> Security groups). The skill opens only TCP 50443 from your ingress sources on these. If none exists, the gitops account creates one ONCE via 1-networking, then records its id here.

kms_key_id.description: Customer-managed MULTI-REGION KMS key (MRK) ARN for storage encryption (key id starts with 'mrk-'). Leave blank ('' or omitted) to CREATE a multi-region CMK via the 3-kms module on the first apply; supply an existing MRK ARN to REUSE it. Record the created ARN here afterward to reuse it.

master_user_secret_kms_key_id.description: MRK CMK ARN encrypting the RDS-managed master-user secret. Leave blank ('' or omitted) to MIRROR kms_key_id (the created or supplied storage CMK); supply a distinct CMK to encrypt the secret separately. Needed with managed master credentials.

monitoring_role_arn.description: IAM role ARN for RDS Enhanced Monitoring. Leave blank ('' or omitted) to CREATE one via the 2-iam module on the first apply; supply an existing role ARN to REUSE it. Record the created ARN here afterward to reuse it.

ingress_cidrs.description: Source CIDR range(s) allowed to reach Db2 SSL port 50443 (e.g. 10.0.0.0/16). 0.0.0.0/0 is rejected unless acknowledged.

ibm_customer_id.description: IBM Passport Advantage customer id (from IBM, not AWS). Low-sensitivity; masked by the skill. Provide this OR ibm_customer_id_ssm. Required for every edition.

ibm_site_id.description: IBM Passport Advantage site id (from IBM, not AWS). Low-sensitivity; masked by the skill. Provide this OR ibm_site_id_ssm. Required for every edition.

ibm_customer_id_ssm.description: Name of an SSM Parameter Store SecureString holding the IBM customer id, e.g. /rds-db2/ibm-customer-id. Use this INSTEAD of ibm_customer_id to keep the value out of the repo; the parameter-group module reads it (decrypted) at apply. The deploy role needs ssm:GetParameter + kms:Decrypt.

ibm_site_id_ssm.description: Name of an SSM Parameter Store SecureString holding the IBM site id, e.g. /rds-db2/ibm-site-id. Use this INSTEAD of ibm_site_id to keep the value out of the repo.

tags.description: Default customer tags for every resource. Project and Owner are REQUIRED and non-empty (Project is also the distinguishing token in the derived db_instance_identifier, so changing it yields a unique instance name; Environment is set from the tier).

gitops_aws_account_id.description: Informational only: the account whose CI role runs terraform apply (and the one-time bootstrap). Used for an identity sanity check; never written into the intent or tfvars.
